findings.description: Duplicate @contextmanager decorated method _conn defined twice (lines 550-557 and 560-566). The second definition shadows the first.
findings.evidence: Lines 550-557 define _conn returning sqlite3.Connection. Lines 560-566 define the exact same method again.

findings.description: Duplicate import: from contextlib import contextmanager appears twice.
findings.evidence: Line 12 and 13 both have the same import.

findings.description: Module docstring appears twice at top of file.
findings.evidence: Lines 1-5 and 7-181 both have identical docstrings.

findings.description: Module-level mutable default: _external_provider persists across imports.
Module-level mutable default: _WHISPER_ENABLED lazily loaded.
datetime.timezone used. Python 3.11+ has datetime.UTC.
Function _ensure_nlm_auth defined twice.
findings.evidence: First at line 52, second at line 1373.

findings.description: Local import redundant since subprocess is at module level.
findings.evidence: Local at line 58, module-level at line 15.

findings.description: Uses Optional instead of X | None syntax.
Bare dict type hint without generics.
findings.evidence: Return type uses dict without type params.

findings.description: bool(pattern.match()) could be pattern.match() is not None.
Regex compiled each call. Could be module-level.
Same regex as categorize.py. Could be shared.
Uses typing.Iterator. 3.10+ can use collections.abc.
callable used without collections.abc import.
callable without proper collections.abc import.
wait imported but may not be used.
from __future__ import annotations unnecessary in 3.12+.
from __future__ import annotations unnecessary in 3.12+.
from __future__ import annotations unnecessary in 3.12+.

summary: Found 20 Python simplification opportunities across 10 files. Critical: PY-001 (duplicate _conn), PY-007 (duplicate _ensure_nlm_auth). Moderate: PY-002 (duplicate import), PY-003 (duplicate docstring), PY-004/PY-005 (mutable defaults). Style: Optional vs | None, datetime.UTC vs timezone, callable vs Callable, future annotations.
